To restart Dify, navigate to the Docker directory and execute the following commands:

```bash
cd docker
docker compose down
docker compose up -d
```

Restarting Dify will recreate its schema, which can be used to delete collections and potentially re-run migrations or setup scripts. Ensure you have a backup before deleting collections as this action removes all associated data.
